summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of AI-based landing page builder. All major features functional including prompt generation, icon strip sidebar, sliding panels, canvas operations, floating properties panel, toolbar features, and export functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Overlay interception preventing delete button clicks on canvas elements
ui_bugs.details: Properties panel or other overlay elements block interaction with element delete buttons

integration_issues.issue: Canvas empty when navigating directly to /builder without AI generation
integration_issues.details: Expected behavior since sessionStorage is empty without AI generation flow

passed_tests: Prompt page loads with coral accent color and functional textarea
Generate button enables/disables based on input
Example prompt chips populate textarea correctly
AI generation works (15-30 second response time)
Builder page loads with proper icon strip sidebar (6 icons)
All sidebar panels open/close correctly (Sections, Elements, Media, Popups, Forms, Apps)
Elements panel has white background and categorized elements
Section templates (Hero, Features, CTA) add sections to canvas
Element items (Heading, Paragraph, Button, Image) add to selected sections
Floating properties panel appears on element/section selection
Properties panel close button (X) works
Toolbar undo/redo buttons properly enabled/disabled
Device preview toggle (desktop/tablet/mobile) changes canvas width
Publish dropdown shows JSON and HTML export options
Export buttons trigger download functions
Back navigation from builder to prompt page works
Sidebar responsive behavior on different screen sizes
Section move up/down and delete functionality
Element duplication functionality
Coral/pink color scheme (#e74c6f) correctly implemented
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix overlay interception issue preventing element delete button clicks. Consider adding force=true to click actions or adjusting z-index layering.
